title: Arai Raider X Silver Metallic

specs.material: Multi-Directional Impact Protection System (MIPS) with Arai's proprietary EPS liner and Carbon Fiber reinforced shell

technical_analysis: The Arai Raider X Silver Metallic utilizes the brand's signature Multi-Directional Impact Protection System (MIPS), which incorporates a low-friction layer between the helmet shell and the liner to reduce rotational forces transferred to the brain during oblique impacts. This technology is integrated into a lightweight, multi-density EPS liner that provides superior energy absorption while maintaining structural integrity at high speeds. The shell construction employs advanced composite materials designed to disperse impact energy across a wider surface area, significantly reducing the risk of penetration and localized deformation compared to traditional single-material shells.
marketing_description: Experience the perfect blend of aggressive styling and uncompromising safety with the Arai Raider X in striking Silver Metallic. Designed for riders who demand precision engineering without sacrificing aesthetics, this helmet features a sleek, aerodynamic profile that cuts through the wind while commanding attention on the track or street. The sophisticated colorway highlights the intricate shell molding, offering a premium look that complements any riding gear.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Arai Raider X Silver Metallic: a full-face helmet featuring MIPS technology, ECE 22.06 certification, and premium aerodynamics for ultimate safety and style.
